name: Andrographolide
summary: Decision-ready summary: Andrographolide is best framed for upper respiratory symptom support; immune response modulation; safety screen: pregnancy; autoimmune disease caution; anticoagulants.
description: Andrographolide supports immune; respiratory with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Avoid in pregnancy; immune-modulating framing needs caution with autoimmune conditions.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Human evidence primarily supports standardized Andrographis extracts, not isolated andrographolide consumer use.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Human evidence primarily supports standardized Andrographis extracts, not isolated andrographolide consumer use.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: research-only isolated constituent; use parent herb extract unless human dose is specified
